roa.docketEntryComment: Order Directing the San Francisco Police Department to Issue a Certificate Designating Nathan Blonkenfeld's Arrest as a Detention Pursuant to Penal Code Sections 849.5 and 851.6
DEFT'S PC849,5 MOTION DEEM ARREST A DETENTION FILED

/CAL:DEFENSE'S PC849,5 AND PC851,6 MOTION/NP/MO GRTD/X:MOTION IS GRANTEDAS TO PC849,5  AND PC851,6,/CTORD: THE PETITIONER'S RECORD OF THE ARREST BY THE SAN FRANCISCO POLICE DEPARTMENT IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SHOW THIS WAS NOT AN ARREST BUT A DETENTION ONLY/X: ORDER DECLARING THEMATTER A DETENTION ONLY SIGNED AND FILED,/
